历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were 376 → 314 → 306 → 280 → 276, showing a continuous upward trend, with a cumulative increase of about 100 positions over 5 years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 276. From 2021 to 2024, the enrollment plan for Physics Category was consistently 21 students, increasing to 22 in 2025, and to 23 in 2026, an expansion of 1 student (about 4.5%) compared to 2025. This slight expansion somewhat alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Zhejiang University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, consistently ranking 3rd on the Soft Science main ranking for many years, placing it among the top universities nationwide. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, involving incidents of academic misconduct and unethical faculty behavior. However, its Douyin popularity is high (overall ranking 14th), with significant short video exposure, maintaining high overall application attention. No obvious admission gaps or interruptions have been observed. Zhejiang University has numerous A+ disciplines (e.g., Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering, Control Science and Engineering, Optical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Civil Engineering, Chemical Engineering and Technology, Pharmacy, Management Science and Engineering, etc.), with over 10 disciplines rated A- or above, demonstrating extremely strong academic strength and strong appeal to candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Zhejiang University's strong engineering majors, such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering, maintain consistently high social popularity. The number of Physics Category candidates in Chongqing increased from 98,954 in 2021 to 139,478 in 2025, showing continuous growth. In 2026, the total number of candidates is approximately 209,000, with Physics Category accounting for about 65%, estimated at around 135,850, intensifying competition. Zhejiang University is located in Hangzhou, Zhejiang Province, not a local university in Chongqing. Chongqing candidates have a strong willingness to apply to top 985 universities outside the province, with no significant regional preference impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous upward trend in historical rankings (cumulative increase of about 100 positions over 5 years), the slight expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan (+1 student) somewhat alleviating competition, the continuous growth of Physics Category candidates in Chongqing, Zhejiang University's top-tier academic strength, and high Douyin attention, the ranking is expected to continue a slight upward trend based on the 2025 baseline of 276. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 274, with a range of 224–324.
